name: Akira
description: [Akira](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1129) ransomware, written in C++, is most prominently (but not exclusively) associated with the ransomware-as-a-service entity [Akira](https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G1024). [Akira](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S1129) ransomware has been used in attacks across North America, Europe, and Australia, with a focus on critical infrastructure sectors incl
